courtLine: The defence asks the court to record that sealed order and service-proof material remain outstanding on the current papers.
clientSummaryPreview:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Lena Ortiz). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. The live issue is the restraining/domestic order position: sealed order, proof of service, and breach location material. An order extract alone is not enough to treat sealed order or service as proved.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
doNotOverstate: Do not treat an order extract alone as proof of sealed order or service.
